channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Bruce Springsteen’s Philadelphia Concert Postponed by 76ers, Flyers’ Playoff Victories
item.description: 🎸 Springsteen's Philly show gets a game-time delay! 🏀🏒 Looks like the Boss will have to wait for the champs to finish their victory dance! 🎶 #RockandRollDelay

item.title: Islands’ Nick Thorburn and Ratata’s Mike Stroud Join Forces as The Creem, Unveil Debut Songs: Stream
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to groove with The Creem! 🕺🎸 Islands' Nick Thorburn and Ratata's Mike Stroud bring the heat with their debut songs. Stream now! 🔥 #TheCreem #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Shakira’s Free Concert Draws 2 Million to Rio De Janeiro’s Copacabana Beach
item.description: Shakira rocked Copacabana Beach with 2 million fans 🎶🏖️ What a party, what a vibe! #ShakiraInRio

item.title: Sugar roared back to life at their first show in 31 years (Webster Hall Night 1 full video, pics, setlist)
item.description: Sugar came back swinging at their first show in 31 years! 🎸🔥 Watch the full video and see the setlist now! #SugarBandRevival 💥

item.title: Watch Olivia Rodrigo Perform New Song With Weyes Blood on SNL
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo and Weyes Blood = dream team on SNL! 🌟✨ Watch this epic collab now! #MusicMagic #SNLJam
